title: Prangos acaulis
taxonomy: Prangos acaulis is a species of plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It is native to the Middle East and Central Asia. The plant is a perennial with a caulescent stem that grows to around 1-2 meters in height. Prangos acaulis is classified in the genus Prangos, which includes several other species of plants. The exact classification of Prangos acaulis may vary depending on the source, but it is generally placed within the Apiaceae family.
